name: Grilled Porcini and Batavian Lettuce With
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation of the Cranberry Beans: Place all ingredients in a heavy saucepan, except for the salt. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce and simmer slowly for twenty minutes. Add salt and finish cooking for approximately five to ten more minutes. Cool beans in juice. Once cold, remove aromatics and take the beans out. Refrigerate beans, but do not discard the cooking juices.
2. Preparation of the Lettuce: Slice the Pancetta as thin as possible on a meat slicer and wrap lettuce with it. Heat a heavy skillet with olive oil until it smokes lightly. Add the wrapped lettuce and garlic cloves, then reduce heat to cook until golden brown for crispy lettuce. Remove from oil and let cool at room temperature. Discard half of the oil and garlic cloves. Reserve half of the oil in the pan.
3. Preparation of the Porcini Mushrooms: Slice cleaned mushrooms into thick slices. Season well and brush with olive oil. Grill both sides until tender, about three minutes per side depending on size. Keep warm.
4. Preparation of the Vinaigrette: Heat the oil from cooking the lettuce in a skillet, add leaves of oregano until they fry. Add brown chicken sauce, sherry vinegar, and olive oil. Serve hot over the mushrooms, beans, and lettuce.
Yield: 4 servings
